attributes.readMe:
## popover-types

Shared TypeScript vocabulary for `<Popover>` — the kind/axis unions plus the kind→glyph / kind→label maps and the escalation-priority resolver. Pulled out of the component so hosts, the playground, and the popover state machine import ONE canonical source instead of reaching into the `.gts`. Pure types + data; no Glimmer, no DOM.

Type exports: `PopoverKind` · `PopoverAnchoring` · `PopoverSize` · `PopoverBackdrop` · `PopoverElevation` · `PopoverKeyboardModel`.

Value exports: `POPOVER_KIND_GLYPHS` (✎ edit · ⓘ details · ⋯ tools), `POPOVER_KIND_LABELS`, `POPOVER_ESCALATION_PRIORITY`, and `resolvePopoverEscalationTarget` (the canonical resolver this spec points at).

```ts
import {
  resolvePopoverEscalationTarget,
  POPOVER_KIND_GLYPHS,
  type PopoverKind,
} from '../utils/popover-types';
```
